templates.body:
PO [po] was due [date]. Need ship date today or replacement source.
Job [job_id] at risk. Account [acct].

PO [po] received wrong: ordered [x] got [y]. Photos attached.
Need RMA + correct ship by [date].
PO [po] short [qty] units. Ship balance no charge by [date] or credit memo.

PO [po] arrived damaged. Photos [n] attached.
Replace or credit by [date].

Hi [name],

Update on [job]: material delay from supplier. New target: [date].

We are absorbing rush cost on our side. I will confirm 24h before install/ship.
Internal: switch PO [po] to backup vendor [name]. Client date holds [date]. Log cost delta.
Reorder PO [template]: [sku] qty [n]. Ship to [address]. Need by [date].
Vendor log: [vendor] · [issue_type] · resolved [y/n] · days late [n] · use again [y/n]
